title: Create: The Air War
description: This mod was created for aerial vehicles. The main function of the mod was to add more weapons to air transport so that people could create an air war between different factions and countries
body:
# Create: The Air War - Second Part Of New Update
![icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f05e373f367c11180972534aecd8ce3c4c5a193.png)


## 1.Weapons



1. C-3K - Close strike cruise missile

2. C-8 - Rocket box containing 9 long strike missiles

3. SC250 - Close strike cruise missile

4. OZM72 - Anti-infantry mine

5. RIM-7 - Long strike cruise missile

6. C-25 - Long strike missile

7. 9K119M - Long strike missile

~~8. Hand Grenade M24 - classic german grenade~~

9. Machine Gun - less 12 bullets to sec

10. Tomahawk - working only with rocket designator, right click to link and set cordinates

11. AIM-9X - new era of air to air rockets, this is anti Create: Aeronautics ship rocket

12. "Vihr" - this is laser rocket can lock in aeronautics ships

13. X-25ML - also laser rocket and can lock in aeronautics and create big boom

## 2.Important

All new updates will be only on NeoForge port, and we will be upload updates on modrinth only v
very soon.

AND THIS MOD NEEDS [Create Aeronautics](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-aeronautics/versions) and supports [Sable](https://modrinth.com/mod/sable)

## 3. Very Important Items

1. Monitor - connect camera and rockets and chill

2. Camera - connect to monitor and get your target

3. Link Cable - this is cable


## 4.Support Buttons

# [Discord](https://discord.gg/FvDhbFYyaa)
